Description: Define prototype scope, success metrics (e.g., identity resolution precision@K > 0.85, clustering silhouette > 0.6), select tech stack (Python 3.12, sentence-transformers, CLIP/ViT, FAISS/Pinecone, scikit-learn/DEC), provision secure compute environment with GPU access and data access controls.
Deliverables: Approved project charter, conda environment, access to customer transaction dataset

Description: Establish ground-truth labels from known customers (multiple purchases per identity), select metrics (pairwise cosine match accuracy, cluster purity, ARI, business KPIs like resolution lift), design ablation studies for unimodal vs. cross-modal embeddings.
Deliverables: Evaluation plan document with metric definitions and baseline targets

Description: Extract subset of real customer data: select N known customers (e.g., 5,000–10,000) with >=3 purchases each, pull product title, description, image URLs, transaction timestamps, amounts; perform anonymization (hash customer IDs, remove PII).
Deliverables: Anonymized transaction dataframe (Parquet) with product metadata and ground-truth customer labels

Description: Download and store product images (handle rate limits, deduplication); clean title/description text (remove boilerplate, normalize brands/categories).
Deliverables: Cleaned product catalog table linked to transactions

Description: Run EDA on purchase distributions, modality coverage (title/desc/image completeness), detect outliers or cold-start customers; impute missing images with placeholders if needed.
Deliverables: Data quality report (Jupyter notebook) with summary statistics and cleaning scripts

Description: Split data at customer level: 70% train (full history for embedding training/fine-tuning), 30% test (hold-out purchases for resolution evaluation); create synthetic anonymous sessions for test set to simulate identity resolution task.
Deliverables: train_transactions.parquet, test_transactions.parquet with stratified customer split

Description: Reserve 10% of train as validation for hyperparameter tuning (e.g., embedding dimensionality, fusion weights).
Implement and compute embeddings: Sentence-BERT for titles, longer BERT variant for descriptions; ViT/CLIP-ViT for images; cache embeddings in vector store.
Deliverables: Unimodal embedding matrices (title.npy, desc.npy, image.npy) for train/test products

Description: Build late-fusion (concat + projection MLP), early-fusion (CLIP-style contrastive alignment), and bilinear cross-attention modules; train/fine-tune on product self-supervised pairs using InfoNCE loss.
Deliverables: Fused embedding generator scripts and pre-computed cross-modal vectors (fused_*.npy)

Description: Aggregate product embeddings per customer: mean-pooling, recency-weighted, or transformer-based sequence encoder; produce customer-level vectors for train and test sets.
Experiment with simple mean vs. attention-weighted vs. basket-level hierarchical pooling; log variance explained by each method.
Implement cosine-similarity nearest-neighbor matching (FAISS index) for linking anonymous test purchases to known customer vectors; set similarity thresholds via validation.
Deliverables: Resolution pipeline script returning matched customer IDs

Description: Apply neural clustering: Deep Embedded Clustering (DEC), variational autoencoder + GMM, baseline k-means/DBSCAN on customer embeddings; tune cluster count via elbow/silhouette.
Deliverables: Clustered customer assignments (labels) and centroid vectors

Description: Build rule-based heuristics (e.g., Jaccard on product categories, TF-IDF bag-of-words) for comparison against embedding approaches.

Compute metrics: precision/recall/F1 for identity resolution, internal clustering metrics, qualitative inspection of clusters vs. spending patterns; run statistical significance tests across embedding strategies.
Deliverables: Evaluation report notebook with tables, ROC curves, and cluster visualizations

Description: Identify failure modes (e.g., cold-start, modality imbalance) and quantify impact of cross-embeddings on performance lift.
Deliverables: Error analysis section with examples and mitigation recommendations

Description: Compile reproducible code repository, prototype results summary, next-step recommendations for production scaling (e.g., online updates, vector DB deployment).
Deliverables: Final prototype Git repo, executive summary slide deck, and research phase report (PDF)
End-to-end prototype validated on real customer data with quantitative comparison of embedding strategies
